description: Letter fragment (two pieces comprising the lower left corner). The sender mentions that he was sick with a fever and cold and nobody (or nobody [except ...]) visited/asked after him (mā iftaqadanī [...]). Mentions 'my master al-Ḥemdat' and 'my master, the rayyis, our rabbi Avraham (Maimonides?).' Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
